name: Human in the Loop
description: Collaborative workflows with validation checkpoints and human oversight

content.title: Human in the Loop
content.content:
# Human in the Loop

Effective AI isn't about replacing humans - it's about **collaboration**. AI handles the heavy lifting while humans provide judgment, validation, and oversight.

## The Collaborative Model

```mermaid
graph LR
    subgraph "AI Handles"
        A[Data extraction]
        B[Classification]
        C[Routine decisions]
        D[Draft generation]
    end

    subgraph "Human Handles"
        E[Judgment calls]
        F[Exception handling]
        G[Final approval]
        H[Quality oversight]
    end

    A --> E
    B --> F
    C --> G
    D --> H
```

## When Humans Get Involved

| Scenario | AI Role | Human Role |
|----------|---------|------------|
| **Low confidence** | Extracts data, flags uncertainty | Reviews and confirms |
| **High value** | Prepares analysis | Makes final decision |
| **Exception** | Identifies anomaly | Determines handling |
| **New pattern** | Flags as unknown | Creates new rule |
| **Sensitive** | Drafts response | Approves before sending |

## Workflow with Checkpoints

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
    participant AI as AI Agent
    participant Queue as Review Queue
    participant User as Human User
    participant System as Target System

    AI->>AI: Process document
    AI->>AI: Extract data
    
    alt High Confidence
        AI->>System: Auto-commit
    else Low Confidence
        AI->>Queue: Add to review queue
        Queue->>User: Request review
        User->>User: Review AI proposal
        User->>System: Approve/Modify
    end
```

## Confidence-Based Routing

AI decisions route based on confidence:

```mermaid
graph TD
    A[AI Decision] --> B{Confidence Level}
    
    B -->|High: 90%+| C[Auto-Process]
    B -->|Medium: 70-90%| D[Quick Review]
    B -->|Low: <70%| E[Full Review]
    
    C --> F[System Update]
    D --> G[User Confirms]
    E --> H[User Completes]
    
    G --> F
    H --> F
```

## Learning from Human Corrections

Every human correction improves future AI performance:

1. **AI proposes** → 2. **Human corrects** → 3. **System learns**

| Human Action | System Learning |
|--------------|----------------|
| Corrects classification | Updates classification patterns |
| Fills missing field | Adds extraction rule |
| Rejects proposal | Flags similar cases for review |
| Creates new category | Expands classification options |

## The User Experience

Humans work with AI, not despite it:

**Without AI:**
- Manual review of every document
- Data entry from scratch
- Search through files for context

**With AI + Human-in-the-Loop:**
- AI pre-fills data, human reviews
- AI suggests classification, human confirms
- AI assembles context, human applies judgment
- Human focuses on exceptions, AI handles routine

## Governance & Audit

| Requirement | How It's Met |
|-------------|-------------|
| **Accountability** | Every decision tracked: AI proposed, human approved |
| **Explainability** | AI provides reasoning for proposals |
| **Override** | Human can always override AI decision |
| **Audit trail** | Full history of AI proposals and human actions |

## Benefits

- **Efficiency**: AI handles volume, humans handle judgment
- **Accuracy**: Human oversight catches AI errors
- **Compliance**: Clear accountability and audit trail
- **Improvement**: Human corrections make AI smarter
- **Trust**: Gradual automation builds confidence
